sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113179" key="xalkotupe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκοτῠπ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n113179.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">work in bronze</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τιμαὶ -τυπούμεναι,</foreign> of honorary statues, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wrought in bronze,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.820b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
